subject: Celebi V, a small green fairy-like creature with large blue eyes and translucent wings, leaping through a glowing green energy field
description: A small green creature with a rounded head, large deep blue eyes, and translucent insect-like wings bursts forward in an energetic leap. Its body is vivid green, smooth and elfin, with tiny limbs extended outward as it moves. Surrounding it is a swirling vortex of green light and energy tendrils, radiating outward against a dark background filled with glowing particles. The composition is dynamic — the creature appears to be charging toward the viewer in a diagonal upward thrust. The holofoil card treatment adds shimmer and depth to the energy effects.
foreground: Celebi leaping forward, green body, blue eyes, translucent wings extended
background: swirling green energy vortex with glowing particles and dark space
